rules.rule: every package MUST trace to: extraction artifacts, synthesis manifests, grounding manifests, evidence manifests, OCR lineage, multimodal continuity, reviewer approvals.
lineage is append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
broken pointers (any cited id that does not resolve) are fail-closed.
lineage MUST cite manifest sha256 of every linked artifact for replay verification.
supersedence MUST cite predecessor package_id and successor package_id; silent replacement is FORBIDDEN.
